# Global Code Format Instructions

## Code Style
- Use 2-space indentation for JavaScript/TypeScript
- Use 4-space indentation for Python
- Always add a newline at end of file

## Naming Conventions
- Use camelCase for variables and functions
- Use PascalCase for classes and interfaces

## Code Review Checklist
- Check for proper error handling
- Verify no hardcoded secrets or credentials
- Ensure functions are < 50 lines
- Verify unit tests are present for new logic
